name: Eduard Retiene
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing lower-class clothing. Armed with an iron mace.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: farmer, peaceful, relaxed, simple, victim, husband
Role: Eduard Retiene is a farmer residing in the small town of Water's Edge with his wife Jolie. He lives a simple, peaceful life in the quiet settlement. Like most residents of Water's Edge, he becomes a tragic victim of the Blackwood Company during their brutal raid. He carries a small amount of gold and an iron mace for protection.
Home Location Information: His house in Water's Edge, which he shares with his wife Jolie.
Daily Routine: Eduard spends all his time inside his house with his wife. They share a two-hour lunch at noon and a two-hour dinner at 6pm. Outside of mealtimes, he wanders around the house. He does not sleep. This peaceful routine ends when he is killed by the Blackwood Company during their attack, after which his body is placed in the center of town with the other victims.
Personality - The Simple Farmer: Eduard lives a quiet, contented life with his wife in Water's Edge. His relaxed existence and simple routines reflect the peaceful nature of the small farming community before tragedy strikes. His death at the hands of the Blackwood Company represents the brutal destruction of innocent, ordinary lives.
author: Bethesda
